list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Here is a suggested commit message for the provided diffs:
Integrate MongoDB and finalize backend API development
- Add MongoDB connection setup and database seeding logic for `components` and `labs` collections on startup in `main.py`. - Create `Architecture` Pydantic model for request data validation. - Update `/api/simulate` endpoint to dynamically calculate cost and performance using component data from MongoDB. - Implement REST API endpoints (`/api/components`, `/api/labs`, `/api/architectures`, `/api/architectures/save`, `/api/architectures/{architecture_id}`) to handle database interactions. - Update `roadmap.md` to check off completed tasks and mark Phase 1 and Phase 2 (Backend Development) as complete. - Update `.idea/workspace.xml` with the latest IDE run configurations and test coverage data.

task.summary:
Initialize CloudLab project with FastAPI backend and documentation
- Create basic FastAPI application in `main.py` with endpoints for simulation logic and predefined labs. - Add `requirements.txt` containing backend dependencies (`fastapi`, `uvicorn`, `pymongo`, `pydantic`). - Add comprehensive project documentation including `README.md` and a phase-by-phase `roadmap.md`. - Initialize `.idea` directory with PyCharm/IntelliJ project configuration files.

Initialize CloudLab project with FastAPI backend and documentation
- Create basic FastAPI application in `main.py` with endpoints for simulation logic and predefined labs. - Add `requirements.txt` containing backend dependencies (`fastapi`, `uvicorn`, `pymongo`, `pydantic`). - Add comprehensive project documentation including `README.md` and a phase-by-phase `roadmap.md`. - Initialize `.idea` directory with PyCharm/IntelliJ project configuration files.

Initialize CloudLab project with FastAPI backend and documentation
- Create basic FastAPI application in `main.py` with endpoints for simulation logic and predefined labs. - Add `requirements.txt` containing backend dependencies (`fastapi`, `uvicorn`, `pymongo`, `pydantic`). - Add comprehensive project documentation including `README.md` and a phase-by-phase `roadmap.md`. - Initialize `.idea` directory with PyCharm/IntelliJ project configuration files.

Initialize CloudLab project with FastAPI backend and documentation
- Create basic FastAPI application in `main.py` with endpoints for simulation logic and predefined labs. - Add `requirements.txt` containing backend dependencies (`fastapi`, `uvicorn`, `pymongo`, `pydantic`). - Add comprehensive project documentation including `README.md` and a phase-by-phase `roadmap.md`. - Initialize `.idea` directory with PyCharm/IntelliJ project configuration files.

Initialize CloudLab project with FastAPI backend and documentation
- Create basic FastAPI application in `main.py` with endpoints for simulation logic and predefined labs. - Add `requirements.txt` containing backend dependencies (`fastapi`, `uvicorn`, `pymongo`, `pydantic`). - Add comprehensive project documentation including `README.md` and a phase-by-phase `roadmap.md`. - Initialize `.idea` directory with PyCharm/IntelliJ project configuration files.

Here is a suggested commit message for the provided diffs:
Integrate MongoDB and finalize backend API development
- Add MongoDB connection setup and database seeding logic for `components` and `labs` collections on startup in `main.py`. - Create `Architecture` Pydantic model for request data validation. - Update `/api/simulate` endpoint to dynamically calculate cost and performance using component data from MongoDB. - Implement REST API endpoints (`/api/components`, `/api/labs`, `/api/architectures`, `/api/architectures/save`, `/api/architectures/{architecture_id}`) to handle database interactions. - Update `roadmap.md` to check off completed tasks and mark Phase 1 and Phase 2 (Backend Development) as complete. - Update `.idea/workspace.xml` with the latest IDE run configurations and test coverage data.

MESSAGE.value:
Initialize CloudLab project with FastAPI backend and documentation
- Create basic FastAPI application in `main.py` with endpoints for simulation logic and predefined labs. - Add `requirements.txt` containing backend dependencies (`fastapi`, `uvicorn`, `pymongo`, `pydantic`). - Add comprehensive project documentation including `README.md` and a phase-by-phase `roadmap.md`. - Initialize `.idea` directory with PyCharm/IntelliJ project configuration files.

Here is a suggested commit message for the provided diffs:
Integrate MongoDB and finalize backend API development
- Add MongoDB connection setup and database seeding logic for `components` and `labs` collections on startup in `main.py`. - Create `Architecture` Pydantic model for request data validation. - Update `/api/simulate` endpoint to dynamically calculate cost and performance using component data from MongoDB. - Implement REST API endpoints (`/api/components`, `/api/labs`, `/api/architectures`, `/api/architectures/save`, `/api/architectures/{architecture_id}`) to handle database interactions. - Update `roadmap.md` to check off completed tasks and mark Phase 1 and Phase 2 (Backend Development) as complete. - Update `.idea/workspace.xml` with the latest IDE run configurations and test coverage data.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Here is a suggested commit message for the provided diffs:
Integrate MongoDB and finalize backend API development
- Add MongoDB connection setup and database seeding logic for `components` and `labs` collections on startup in `main.py`. - Create `Architecture` Pydantic model for request data validation. - Update `/api/simulate` endpoint to dynamically calculate cost and performance using component data from MongoDB. - Implement REST API endpoints (`/api/components`, `/api/labs`, `/api/architectures`, `/api/architectures/save`, `/api/architectures/{architecture_id}`) to handle database interactions. - Update `roadmap.md` to check off completed tasks and mark Phase 1 and Phase 2 (Backend Development) as complete. - Update `.idea/workspace.xml` with the latest IDE run configurations and test coverage data.
